title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY WASHINGTON COUNTY HOPE CENTER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides payment assistance for electric and internet bills. Portland General Electric (PGE) customers may be eligible for one-time emergency assistance up to $399. Customers of Hillsboro Utility may receive assistance one to two times per 12-month period up to $250. Assistance is not guaranteed and is subject to available funds. 1440 SE 21st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: PGE, Hillsboro Utility, Sherwood Utility, and HiLight Bridge Internet customers Hours: Utility assistance appointments: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon Emergency walk-ins: 1st Thursday of the month 1pm-4pm Email (503) 640-4311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 640-4311 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information or with questions about the application process FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -ID for all household members 18 and older -Current bill in applicant's name at the time of processing -Proof of income from the last 60 days for all household members 18 and older LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Internet Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - CITY OF HILLSBORO, CORNELIUS, & SHERWOOD WATER BILL VERIFICATION ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY WASHINGTON COUNTY HOPE CENTER
